card_analysis.core_mechanic: Defender creatures can attack as though they didn't have defender, and they assign combat damage using toughness
triggered_abilities: Whenever a creature with defender enters the battlefield under your control, draw a card
static_abilities: Defender creatures can attack as though they didn't have defender
Each creature you control with defender assigns combat damage equal to its toughness

strategic_profile.game_plan_summary: Deploy cheap, high-toughness defender creatures that Arcades transforms into efficient attackers. Each defender ETB draws a card, creating a card-advantage engine. The deck inverts the stat line — toughness IS power here. Cards evaluated on their toughness, not their power stat.

win_conditions.description: Swing with a board of walls that deal damage equal to their toughness
Infinite mana via Axebane Guardian + Freed from the Real with many defenders

build_paths.name: Wall Aggro
build_paths.description: Maximize cheap defenders with high toughness for a fast clock

anti_synergies.description: Power-based damage effects are anti-synergy since most creatures have 0-1 power
anti_synergies.reasoning: These trigger on power, which is near-zero for defenders

strategic_constraints.mana_base_requirements: Three-color with early green for ramp

power_indicators.notes: Consistent card draw and cheap threats, but fragile to board wipes and commander removal

value_inversions.normal_heuristic: Creatures are evaluated primarily by power — higher power means more damage
value_inversions.inverted_value: Arcades makes creatures deal damage equal to toughness, so toughness IS the damage stat
value_inversions.evaluation_guidance: Evaluate creatures by toughness-to-mana ratio, not power-to-mana ratio. A 0/5 for 2 mana is a 5-damage threat for 2 mana.

value_inversions.normal_heuristic: Defender is a downside keyword that prevents attacking
value_inversions.inverted_value: Arcades lets defenders attack AND draws a card when they ETB — defender becomes an upside keyword
undesired_characteristics: creatures without defender that have similar stats
value_inversions.evaluation_guidance: Prefer defender creatures over equivalent non-defenders. A 0/4 defender for 2 draws a card; a 2/4 for 2 without defender does not.

mispriced_card_examples.why_undervalued: 0/8 flying shroud defender for 3 mana is an 8-damage unblockable-ish threat with Arcades
0/4 for 1 mana is a 4-power creature that cantrips for 1 with Arcades
Gives all walls +1/+0 and banding — toughness pump is actually a power pump here
